decodeShape: YAP gzip ListExportResult with Data = ListExportInfo
proofBoundary: export-proven structure only; browser print and scanned QR behavior not claimed
generationRules: place QR control inside the single-record print page
bind QR to current record or record business code field
do not use static placeholder QR URLs
redaction: raw payloads, Resource, Sign, IDs, tenant data, sample records, and private URLs omitted
